action.reasoning: Observation: checkpoint inspection confirms checkpoints/best.pt was overwritten and now only contains bare model weights with infer_logit_tau=-1.0, while stage1.pt still exists from the good decoupled pipeline. Analysis: the best hidden score (0.8092) came from the exact two-stage calibrated recipe, so the highest expected-value action is to rerun that recipe from scratch to a fresh immutable checkpoint path, then smoke-test predict and submit. To avoid prior confusion, I will not modify predict.py behavior materially; I’ll just train with explicit output paths. Decision: run stage 1 representation training with plain CE and no weighted sampler, then stage 2 classifier-only retraining with class-balanced CE + weighted sampler + calibration, saving to new checkpoint names under checkpoints/repro_*.pt, then validate locally and submit the final fresh checkpoint.
action.command: python train.py --data_dir /data --epochs 8 --batch_size 64 --lr 3e-4 --weight_decay 5e-4 --loss ce --sampler none --save_path checkpoints/repro_stage1.pt && python train.py --data_dir /data --epochs 8 --batch_size 64 --lr 1e-3 --weight_decay 1e-4 --loss cb --sampler weighted --freeze_backbone --resume checkpoints/repro_stage1.pt --save_path checkpoints/repro_best.pt --calibrate

command_output.stderr:
usage: train.py [-h] [--data_dir DATA_DIR] [--epochs EPOCHS]
                [--batch_size BATCH_SIZE] [--lr LR]
                [--weight_decay WEIGHT_DECAY] [--img_size IMG_SIZE]
                [--num_workers NUM_WORKERS] [--seed SEED]
                [--model_name MODEL_NAME] [--dropout DROPOUT]
                [--sampler {none,weighted}]
                [--loss {ce,logit_adjusted,cb_ce,ldam}]
                [--label_smoothing LABEL_SMOOTHING] [--logit_tau LOGIT_TAU]
                [--freeze_backbone] [--resume RESUME] [--save_path SAVE_PATH]
                [--calibrate]
train.py: error: argument --loss: invalid choice: 'cb' (choose from 'ce', 'logit_adjusted', 'cb_ce', 'ldam')
